prompt:
You are Agent 12 of 12 working on a codebase at /var/folders/45/myq5db_n6q5cyhtb39vkbmp80000gn/T/twining-bench-5jPFNm.

## Codebase Orientation
This is a TypeScript service (~1,140 lines, ~24 files).

Directory structure:
```
src/
  models/        # Data models and interfaces
  services/      # Business logic layer
  repositories/  # Data access layer
  utils/         # Shared utilities (database, logger, pagination)
  events/        # Event definitions (if using event-driven pattern)
  adapters/      # External service adapters (email, webhook, etc.)
  validators/    # Validation logic
  config/        # Configuration
tests/           # Test files mirroring src/ structure
```

Your task: Final review and cleanup of the notification system.

Specifically:
1. Review the full notification system built across 11 previous sessions.
2. Check architectural consistency — all adapters follow the same pattern, preferences support all channels, history captures all notifications.
3. Check for any remaining issues: compilation errors, failing tests, TODO comments, inconsistencies.
4. Fix any issues you find.
5. Ensure the codebase compiles and ALL tests pass.
6. Write a brief summary of the system architecture and any known limitations.

Important:
- This is the final session — everything should work.
- Focus on consistency and correctness, not new features.
- If you find architectural inconsistencies between sessions, fix them to follow the original design.

parameters.prompt: Read ALL source files (not test files, not node_modules) in this codebase. I need the full contents of every .ts file under src/, plus config/database.config.ts, tsconfig.json, and vitest.config.ts. Report the full contents of each file, organized by directory.
Read ALL test files in the tests/ directory of this codebase. Report the full contents of every .test.ts file, organized by subdirectory. I need complete contents, not summaries.

parameters.old_string:
## Layer Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│          Service Layer                   │
│   UserService, OrderService              │
│   (business logic, validation)           │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          Repository Layer                │
│   BaseRepository, UserRepository,        │
│   OrderRepository                        │
│   (data access abstraction)              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          Utility Layer                   │
│   Database, Logger, Pagination           │
│   (infrastructure, shared utilities)     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘

         ┌──────────────────┐
         │   Event System    │
         │   EventBus        │
         │   (cross-cutting) │
         └──────────────────┘
```
parameters.new_string:
## Layer Architecture

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│          Service Layer                                        │
│   UserService, OrderService, NotificationService,             │
│   PreferencesService, NotificationHistoryService              │
│   (business logic, validation, notification routing)          │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          Adapter Layer                                        │
│   EmailAdapter, SmsAdapter, WebhookAdapter                    │
│   (channel-specific notification delivery)                    │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          Repository Layer                                     │
│   BaseRepository, UserRepository, OrderRepository,            │
│   PreferencesRepository, NotificationLogRepository            │
│   (data access abstraction)                                   │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          Utility Layer                                        │
│   Database, Logger, Pagination                                │
│   (infrastructure, shared utilities)                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

         ┌──────────────────┐
         │   Event System    │
         │   EventBus        │
         │   (cross-cutting) │
         └──────────────────┘
```

parameters.old_string:
## Module Dependencies

```
UserService ──→ UserRepository ──→ Database
     │                                ↑
     ├──→ EventBus                    │
     │                                │
OrderService ──→ OrderRepository ─────┘
     │
     ├──→ UserRepository (validation)
     ├──→ EventBus
     │
NotificationService ──→ EventBus (listener)
```
parameters.new_string:
## Module Dependencies

```
UserService ──→ UserRepository ──→ Database
     │                                ↑
     ├──→ EventBus                    │
     │                                │
OrderService ──→ OrderRepository ─────┘
     │                                ↑
     ├──→ UserRepository (validation) │
     ├──→ EventBus                    │
     │                                │
NotificationService ──→ EventBus (listener + emitter)
     │                                │
     ├──→ NotificationAdapters        │
     │     ├── EmailAdapter           │
     │     ├── SmsAdapter             │
     │     └── WebhookAdapter         │
     ├──→ PreferencesService (opt-in) │
     │                                │
PreferencesService ──→ PreferencesRepository ──→ Database
     │                                │
NotificationHistoryService ──→ EventBus (listener)
     │
     └──→ NotificationLogRepository ──→ Database
```
